channel.title: Model Versioning on Anes Benmerzoug
channel.description: Recent content in Model Versioning on Anes Benmerzoug

item.title: Model Versioning with MLflow
item.description: In this very first post we will talk about machine learning model versioning and more specifically machine learning classifier versioning. Of course, one could simply compare accuracies ( or whichever metric you’re using ) on a separate test set and promote whichever classifier has a better value but that does not offer us the same guarantees as statistical tests. For example, one may train two different classifiers on the same dataset and get the following results on a separate test set:
